attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; operates as a finisher in sprint scenarios rather than initiating moves. Positioned for opportunistic placements when team plans break down.
team_tactics: Functions in leadout/support role but team execution appears inconsistent. Positioned well into finales but coordination frequently breaks down in final kilometers.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes where positioning matters more than pure power. Struggles when sustained efforts required in final 600m or when pure sprinter watts needed.
vulnerability: Exposed when team plans fragment in chaotic finales; lacks closing speed inside final 600m when positioned but isolated. Miscommunication leaves him mid-role between leadout and finisher.
key_patterns: Team tactics break down in finale, leaving him between leadout and finishing roles (2 instances)
Well-positioned entering final kilometer but fades when extended closing effort required (2 instances)
Capitalizes on teammate misfortune for opportunistic top-3 finishes rather than planned outcomes (1 instance)
form_trajectory: neutral: limited recent data, but 2023 shows similar positioning issues as 2018, suggesting role confusion persists
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 12
